src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/Web.general_idea: Removed the @EnableRedisConfiguration annotation, likely because Redis configuration is now handled automatically or via a different mechanism in the updated dependencies.
Added BufferingApplicationStartup to capture and buffer application startup metrics for performance monitoring.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Replace the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6.x requirements for Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.human_impl: Changed import and annotation from EnableGlobalMethodSecurity to EnableMethodSecurity

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Migrate the EntityManagerFactory import from the javax.persistence package to the jakarta.persistence package to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by the newer Spring Boot version.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain beans to comply with Spring Security 6+ API changes required for JDK 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.human_impl: public SecurityFilterChain restFilterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception { ... return http.build(); }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Switch from authorizeRequests().antMatchers() to authorizeHttpRequests().requestMatchers() and use WebExpressionAuthorizationManager for access rules.
Replace WebSecurity.ignoring() configuration inside adapter with a dedicated WebSecurityCustomizer bean.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.human_impl: @Bean public WebSecurityCustomizer webSecurityCustomizer() { return web -> web.ignoring().requestMatchers(...); }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Update static import from BASE_USER_ROLE to BASE_USER_AUTHORITY to match updated constant naming in dependencies.
Explicitly configure Content-Security-Policy and Referrer-Policy headers in the new SecurityFilterChain definitions.
Enable default CORS configuration in the REST security filter chain.
Integrate custom REST security logging configuration into the filter chain.
Apply LmsFilterSecurityInterceptorObjectPostProcessor to authorization rules for enhanced logging or auditing.
Explicitly set HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository for LTI configuration in the new filter chain.
Restrict Swagger configuration to a specific Spring profile to disable it in production environments.
Enforce OAuth2 security requirement globally for the OpenAPI definition.
Define a specific API group to scan only REST controllers for documentation.
Migrate servlet API imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Update the request attribute key for error status code to match the new Jakarta Servlet namespace.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ module naming conventions required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
Update JPQL queries to use boolean literals (false) instead of integer literals (0) for boolean fields.
Correct JPQL query field references to match Java property naming conventions (camelCase).
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.human_impl: order by modifiedOn desc // instead of modifiedon

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ module naming conventions required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Update JPQL query to use entity relationship navigation instead of raw field access to ensure correctness with the entity model.
